markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, new strategy, and upcoming partnership review.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Partnership Review:** A key meeting is set for Monday to discuss the partnership's high cost relative to a "co-building" phase and explore a more sustainable go-forward contract.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** GrowthX proposed a new content strategy (e.g., glossary pages) to build trust and capture top-of-funnel traffic with minimal regulatory review.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Pipeline Streamlining:** GrowthX is implementing process improvements, including manual SEO indexing, a new content calendar, and a list of compliance-safe terms from Brian's AI tool.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [**Holiday Push:** 10 articles will be published this week; GrowthX is also revising 5 pending articles and restaging 2 missing ones to maximize content availability for the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Review & Contract

  - [**Context:** Brian noted the partnership felt like a "co-building" phase, where Biologica bore the full cost of iterating on processes and systems.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [**Monday Meeting Agenda:**](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [Address the "co-building" dynamic.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
      - [Explore a more reasonable go-forward contract, as the current cost is not sustainable.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Brian confirmed the writing quality is strong; the main bottleneck is the regulatory review process.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Capture top-of-funnel traffic and build brand trust with content that requires minimal regulatory review.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Proposed Format:** Glossary pages defining general health terms (e.g., "what is PMS," "what is menopause").](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Regulatory Question:** Brian will confirm if *any* mention of Biologica requires a full regulatory review.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [**Potential Solution:** Create a standardized list of compliance-safe phrases for product mentions to avoid triggering a full review.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### Content Pipeline & Publishing

  - [**Regulatory Review:** Brian's AI tool is finding fewer issues, but consistent problematic terms remain.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Action:** Brian will use the AI tool to generate a list of 10–20 frequently flagged terms for GrowthX to learn from.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [**Publishing Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [**Goal:** Reduce Brian's publishing lift.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [**Interim:** GrowthX's team will publish immediately obvious content; unclear items will be held to prevent mislabeling.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [**Long-Term:** Katya will create clear columns and tags in the content OS to streamline the process.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**Pipeline Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [**This Week:** 10 articles to be published.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [**Revisions:** 2 of 5 pending articles are complete, with more in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [**Missing Articles:** 2 articles staged by GrowthX are not visible in the CMS; Brian confirmed they are not published.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**January Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [Clear the backlog of \~23 articles needing link checks.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [Process any new revision requests.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### Process & Tooling Improvements

  - [**SEO Indexing:** GrowthX will manually submit blog pages to Google weekly to ensure they are indexed and visible in search results.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [**Content OS View:** Katya is building a cleaner content calendar view in the OS to provide better visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will record a Loom walkthrough for Brian.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [**Pipeline Adjustment:** GrowthX's engineering team is reviewing Brian's proposal to reduce manual work.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brian:**](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [Use AI tool to generate a list of 10–20 frequently flagged terms.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [Confirm if *any* mention of Biologica requires a full regulatory review.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [Restage the 2 missing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [Record and send a Loom walkthrough of the new content calendar view.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Create clear columns and tags in the content OS to streamline publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [Publish 10 articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [Complete revisions for pending articles.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [Begin manual SEO indexing of blog pages.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [Prioritize link checks and revisions in January.](https://fathom.video/share/UkDjjfCQviSSjVHzV8UVyLstytTBqWy3?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
